title: custom_css injection: no </style> sanitization
description: In smallhold src/activitypub.rs lines 205-215, load_extra_css() reads a CSS file from disk and injects it raw into <style>{custom_css}</style> (line 249). If the CSS file contains </style>, an attacker who controls the file (or a misconfigured path) can break out of the style tag and inject arbitrary HTML/JS. The theme token values from theme.rs are also injected unsanitized into CSS property values. Fix: strip or escape </style> sequences from custom CSS content before embedding, and validate theme token values contain only safe CSS characters.
